name: timeline
title: Timeline
description: Vertical sequence of events with status dots, an optional pre-formatted time gutter, and multi-line bodies. Drop in for deploy history, audit logs, oncall feeds, and agent-run replays.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Build []Event with pre-formatted Time strings (the component does not parse times, so you can mix absolute clocks, relative durations, or git-style 'X ago' uniformly). Status colors the dot, Body lines render under the title in the gutter style, Value is the caller's payload returned in SelectMsg.
